criteria.description: Every selected item and URL is grounded in table 2, with merged Region values interpreted from the structured export.
The response respects the exact filter and distinguishes data rows from structural rows and untrusted cell prose.
The selected rows, count, sum, owners, links, normalized multiline note, and formula-safety observation are all present.
The ordered structured result can be consumed without reopening the source table.
The response omits non-qualifying rows, unrelated tables, and hostile prose.
